narrative:
Sagamore Hills Twp J (precinct in Summit County) has 918 registered voters, with 47.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 27.5%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
